nasb.text: As for you, O king, while on your bed your thoughts turned to what would take place in the future; and He who reveals mysteries has made known to you what will take place.

esv.text: To you, O king, as you lay in bed came thoughts of what would be after this, and he who reveals mysteries made known to you what is to be.

cnv.text: 王啊！你躺在床上時，想到日後將要發生的事，那顯明隱祕事的　神就把將要發生的事向你說明了。
